title: Prinos deciduus
taxonomy: Prinos deciduus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and belongs to the genus Prinos. The family Celastraceae is a group of plants commonly known as the bittersweet family. Celastraceae is a part of the larger order Celastrales, which also includes the families Parnassiaceae and Lepidobotyaceae. This classification helps to group Prinos deciduus with other related species and provides a framework for understanding its evolutionary relationships.

Furthermore, its extracts are used in the treatment of various respiratory issues.
